about.title: About ZeroDayCTF
about.subtitle: The ultimate cybersecurity challenge platform where hackers learn, compete, and evolve
about.missionText1: ZeroDayCTF is a cutting-edge Capture The Flag platform designed to challenge and elevate cybersecurity enthusiasts worldwide. We curate real challenges from past CTF tournaments sourced from CTFtime and other prestigious platforms, giving you the opportunity to solve authentic security puzzles.
about.missionText2: Our unique approach combines 7-day challenges from real CTF competitions with 24-hour exclusive challenges that are either AI-generated or crafted by our community of expert hackers.
about.missionText3: Whether you're a beginner taking your first steps into cybersecurity or an elite hacker looking for the next challenge, ZeroDayCTF provides a competitive environment to test your skills, learn new techniques, and climb the global leaderboard.
about.readySubtitle: Join thousands of hackers from around the world and prove your skills
about.f1Desc: Battle proven CTF challenges from real competitions. First blood gets bonus points!
about.f2Desc: Exclusive daily challenges . Top 3 solvers earn massive bonuses!
about.f3Desc: Climb the global leaderboard. Track your progress with detailed stats.
about.f4Desc: Web, Crypto, Pwn, Reverse Engineering, Forensics, Mobile, Hardware, OSINT, and more!
about.f5Desc: Form a team with friends, combine your skills, and dominate the teams leaderboard.
about.f6Desc: Progress from beginner to elite with challenges ranging from Easy to Insane difficulty.
about.w1l1: Real challenges from past CTF competitions worldwide
about.w1l2: Available for 7 days with rotating challenges
about.w1l4: Points based on difficulty and category
